<script>
  // Define el objeto del manifiesto
  var manifestObject = {
    short_name: "Wookcom",
    name: "Wookcom",
    icons: [
      {
        src: "https://global-files-nginx.builderall.com/642c9bb4-8da1-4654-aef4-b13d1635b384/812bb0b0a63c312a28253a757d9702e6fbc4deab352a1c97fa065e47a757ceb8.svg",
        sizes: "192x192",
        type: "image/png"
      },
      {
        src: "https://global-files-nginx.builderall.com/642c9bb4-8da1-4654-aef4-b13d1635b384/812bb0b0a63c312a28253a757d9702e6fbc4deab352a1c97fa065e47a757ceb8.svg",
        sizes: "512x512",
        type: "image/png"
      }
    ],
    start_url: "/",
    display: "standalone",
    background_color: "#0471F1",
    theme_color: "#0471F1"
  };

  // Convierte el objeto del manifiesto en una cadena JSON
  var manifestJSON = JSON.stringify(manifestObject);

  // Crea una Blob a partir de la cadena JSON
  var manifestBlob = new Blob([manifestJSON], { type: 'application/json' });

  // Crea una URL para la Blob
  var manifestURL = URL.createObjectURL(manifestBlob);

  // Crea un elemento link y establece sus atributos
  var link = document.createElement('link');
  link.rel = 'manifest';
  link.href = manifestURL;

  // Agrega el elemento link al head del documento
  document.head.appendChild(link);
</script>

<script>
	var _pattern = /office.builderall.(local|io|com)\/[a-z]{2}\/office\/create/,
		_form = document.getElementsByTagName('form');

	for (var i = 0, len = _form.length; i < len; i++) {

		var _action = _form[i].action,
			_isTargetForm = _action.match(_pattern);

		// If is a searched form (register|subscribe_MB)
		if (_isTargetForm && _isTargetForm.length) {

			var _input = document.createElement('input');

			_input.type = 'hidden';
			_input.name = 'cadastro_origem';
			_input.value = location.host;

			// Add input to form
			_form[i].appendChild(_input);

		}
	}

	var Publicar = new function c_Publicar() {
        this.getOptions = function(index) {
            if (typeof index != "undefined") {
            	if(index == 'mailingBossKey'){
            		return localStorage.getItem('MAILING_BOSS_TOKEN');
                }
                return OPTIONS_INIT_SITE.options[index];
            }
            return OPTIONS_INIT_SITE;
        };
	};

</script>
